purpose: Evaluate whether an AI preserves URF/Chronos frontier boundaries, extracts weakest missing lemmas, and refuses theorem promotion.

levels.0: Forbidden theorem promotion or false closure.
levels.2: Repeats status text but misses the missing lemma.
levels.3: Preserves open boundaries and classifies restricted closure correctly.
levels.4: Extracts the weakest sufficient missing lemma.
levels.5: Produces boundary-preserving repo artifacts or verifier-compatible output.
levels.6: Finds counterexample, gives weakest repair, and refuses theorem promotion.

cases.input: Unrestricted GraphSemanticCycleOverlapRankDominatedByColapRank is false. Counterexample: colapRank = 0 and cycleOverlapRank = 1. Restricted domination closes only under explicit cycleOverlap_le_colap.
cases.task: Classify the result, state what is solved, state what remains open, and provide the weakest sufficient repair without overclaiming.

expected.solved: Restricted domination closes only under explicit cycleOverlap_le_colap.
expected.open: Unrestricted graph-semantic cycle-overlap domination remains open.
expected.weakest_sufficient_lemma: For every admissible graph-semantic input X, cycleOverlapRank X <= colapRank X.

cases.input: A non-Prop witness surface has been added, but SemanticRankRateToFiberEntropySoundness and UniversalFiberEntropyGap remain unproved.
cases.task: Classify the result and state the missing bridge.

expected.solved: A witness or surface is present.
expected.open: The theorem-level semantic rank-rate to fiber-entropy bridge remains open.
expected.weakest_sufficient_lemma: A theorem-level bridge from non-Prop rank entropy witness data to SemanticRankRateToFiberEntropySoundness.

cases.input: A dashboard row reports green CI and high repository integrity while preserving no theorem-level H4.1/FGL closure and no Chronos-RR closure.
cases.task: Classify whether dashboard integrity implies theorem closure.

expected.solved: Repository status and CI visibility are recorded.
expected.open: The theorem-level mathematical closure remains open.
expected.weakest_sufficient_lemma: A separate theorem-level proof artifact, not a dashboard status row.
